## `designrbi`

  
  
  

#### Overview

`designrbi` is an R package for conducting statistical inference on
randomized experiments using the randomization-based framework. It
offers a series of helpful functions.

- [`experiment_to_schedule()`](https://github.com/andrewpbray/designrbi/reference/experiment_to_schedule.md)
  will transform the data from an experiment into a schedule of
  potential outcomes with the missing outcomes showing up as `NA`.
- [`impute_unobserved()`](https://github.com/andrewpbray/designrbi/reference/impute_unobserved.md)
  will impute the missing potential outcomes in a schedule using a
  constant effect of your choice.
- [`sim_experiment()`](https://github.com/andrewpbray/designrbi/reference/sim_experiment.md)
  will simulate one or more experiments based on a given schedule of
  potential outcomes.
- [`as_schedule()`](https://github.com/andrewpbray/designrbi/reference/as_schedule.md)
  will take a pre-existing data frame with all of the potential outcomes
  present and convert it into a schedule object.

#### Installation

Install the package directly from github using the `remotes` package.

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
library(remotes)
install_github("andrewpbray/designrbi")
```

See the **Articles** link in the top menu for guidance on how to use the
package.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`as_schedule()`](https://github.com/andrewpbray/designrbi/reference/as_schedule.md)
  : Coerce a wide data frame to a schedule of potential outcomes
- [`experiment_to_schedule()`](https://github.com/andrewpbray/designrbi/reference/experiment_to_schedule.md)
  : Convert experimental data to a schedule of potential outcomes
- [`impute_unobserved()`](https://github.com/andrewpbray/designrbi/reference/impute_unobserved.md)
  : Impute Unobserved Potential Outcomes
- [`sim_experiment()`](https://github.com/andrewpbray/designrbi/reference/sim_experiment.md)
  : Simulate a randomized experiment
